title: English Reel | Break the ice
youtubeTitle: Break the ice — English idiom in 30s
youtubeDescription: Learn the idiom "break the ice" with real examples. New phrase every day! #shorts #learnenglish #idioms

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It means to start a conversation in a relaxed, friendly way.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He told a joke to break the ice.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let's play a game to break the ice at the party.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You can use it at work, at school, or at any party.
